Visitor Link and QR Code

This creates a separate visitor only form. The QR does not open your dashboard.

This is the exact URL inside the QR code. It should include ?form=visitor.

Customized Follow Up

Saved Search Builder

This turns each visitor into a simple saved search brief you can copy into Flexmls, BoldTrail, Follow Up Boss, or your CRM.

Saved Search Briefs

Each lead can become a search brief based on desired areas, timeline, financing needs, and what they liked or disliked.

Team Settings

CRM Connection Notes

Use CSV export or connect Formspree to Zapier so each sign in can create or update a lead inside your CRM.

Suggested Zapier flow: Formspree submission Create or update contact in CRM Add tag Open House Add property address Create task Follow up today Send saved search email Send financing intro when needed
